name: Plex
description: Connect to Plex Media Server — search library, browse collections, control playback, view active sessions
author: Crow

env_vars.name: PLEX_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Plex authentication token (see skill for how to find it)

env_vars.name: PLEX_MACHINE_ID
env_vars.description: Plex server machine identifier (optional, for multi-server setups)

env_vars.name: PLEX_MEDIA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for media files (Docker self-host mode)

env_vars.name: PLEX_CONFIG_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for Plex config/database (Docker self-host mode)

env_vars.name: PLEX_CLAIM_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Plex claim token for initial server setup (Docker self-host mode, from plex.tv/claim)

notes: Connects to an existing Plex Media Server. Optionally self-host via Docker (set PLEX_MEDIA_PATH + PLEX_CLAIM_TOKEN). Plex Web is a SPA and cannot be proxied behind a subpath.
